# [Clang] Assertion `Param->hasDefaultArg() && "can't build nonexistent default arg"` failed.

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176405

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 17.0.1.
GCC and clang 16 accept the c++ code.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/n3vaeG1br
Same assertion as #139053, but with different stack dump.

## Program
```cpp
template <int> struct bad {
  template <auto = []<typename... U>(U...) {}()> struct X;
  static int f() {
  }
};
int y = bad<0>::f();
```

## Program
```cpp
template &lt;int&gt; struct bad {
  template &lt;auto = []&lt;typename... U&gt;(U...) {}()&gt; struct X;
  static int f() {
  }
};
int y = bad&lt;0&gt;::f();
```
